testcase.name: PPOM WhatsApp Integration › Should display FreeFire UID in WhatsApp notification

failure.message: ppom-whatsapp.spec.ts:15:7 Should display FreeFire UID in WhatsApp notification

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: PPOM WhatsApp Integration › Should display multiple PPOM fields in WhatsApp
PPOM WhatsApp Integration › Admin panel should show PPOM customizations

failure.message: ppom-whatsapp.spec.ts:190:7 Admin panel should show PPOM customizations

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e/02-ppom/ppom-whatsapp.spec.ts:190:7 › PPOM WhatsApp Integration › Admin panel should show PPOM customizations
Error: locator.count: Unexpected token "=" while parsing css selector "[class*='purple'], text=/\w+\s*:\s*\w+/". Did you mean to CSS.escape it?
